messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0173",
  "title": "POINT AWARDS",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## POINT AWARDS

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "POINT AWARDS" and contains no substantive text, data, or references. It does not provide information on topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Consequently, it cannot answer any retrieval questions regarding the criteria, processes, or details of point awards.
